themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "And Hoshea the son of Elah made a conspiracy against Pekah the son of Remaliah, and smote him...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּקְשָׁר: made - to tie, physically (gird, confine, compact) or mentally (in love, league)".
